Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Cursed Ritual Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE a Unicorn card. If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may DESTROY a Basic Unicorn card.

Whalemen Wanted is a solitaire action roleplaying game set in the early-to-mid 19th century, 1820-1860, in which players take on the role of a New England whaling ship master charged by his owners and agent to take a vessel, outfit it with an appropriate crew and equipment, hunt whales, render their oil and bone, and return it to New England in order to make a profit.

The game seeks to emulate the feel of the period, remaining as historical and authentic as possible with plenty of flavor, while abiding by abstraction in combat, movement, and so on to facilitate a sense of ease of play. 
The player begins in New England by creating their whaling master, or captain -- ordinarily a man with likely over a decade of experience in the trade. Next, each whaling voyage is begun by determining the type of vessel your master is assigned to captain, followed by calculating the outfitting costs, crewmen to hire, provisions and materials to store, and so on. 
Thereafter, players travel across the globe, resolving possible events per each "travel box" entered, some of which may be exceptionally geographically or seasonally dangerous. 
Once arriving in each desired whaling ground, the master can make the decision to cruise the area in search of "blows", or the water spouts indicating one or more whales coming to the surface to breathe, and then hunt those whales if desired in turn-based, dynamic dice and card combat. 
When the player is satisfied with his spoils, he can decide to return to New England and sell the whale products, with the goal of selling them for more money than the initial expenses of the voyage, as well as any expenses made along the way.
The game officially ends if the player voluntarily (or involuntarily) retires, is killed, or completes no more than 20 voyages; most whaling masters however only completed 1 or 2 voyages!

Whalemen Wanted requires two ten-sided (d10) dice to play, and may be (but is not required) enhanced by taking notes and keeping a log on a separate sheet of paper, or digitally with any free word-like program, as your master's story develops.

—description from the designer

35 Le Franc Tireur Magazine's updated scenarios (FT13 - FT17, FT49 - FT78) from the very first LFT and FTC issues.

The 35 updated scenarios are coming from LFT#5 (with one overlay), LFT#9 (with2 overlays), FTC # 1 & 2 (and another couple of overlays).

From deep within the mysterious Fog, a menacing dragon arrives in the lands of Lindwurm.

The Thunderous Gust is a violent creature that will cause terror in its wake, and our group of adventurers will have to work together to defeat this enormous enemy. A challenging and exciting battle awaits us in this expansion!

The Thunderous Gust PVC miniature brings with it its own standalone side-quest for you to choose your favorite heroes and face this powerful and fearsome dragon. And if you already have its twin brother, the Infinity Deathmatch TAG Raid Steindrage.

The necessary items (enemy card and token) to play this special scenario are included in the Core box.

boardgame: Щенячий патруль: Герої Бухти Пригод (Paw Patrol: Heroes of Adventure Bay)
description:
This cooperative game invites players to take on the roles of the beloved PAW Patrol pups — Chase, Marshall, Skye, Rocky, Rubble, and Zuma — to protect Adventure Bay from various challenges. Each pup has a unique specialization, and only teamwork can ensure the safety of the town.

The game board represents Adventure Bay, divided into zones (beach, town center, and outskirts), with specific tasks emerging throughout the zones. Players use character-specific dice to determine movement and collect resource tokens needed to solve the tasks. During their turn, players can move, exchange tokens, or contribute to task cards, which represent the challenges. Successful task completion requires matching the specified tokens to the card. Cooperation is key, as players can share tokens when meeting on the board.

Players win by completing all task cards in the deck before three tasks are missed (tracked on a separate part of the board). If three tasks are missed, the game ends in defeat. Alternate game modes include a competitive variant, where players compete to complete the most tasks, and an extended mode for longer gameplay.

Hellfire under Water is designed as a supplement to Hellfire.

‘Boldly going’ where Hellfire had too much sense to go. 
It’s not intended to be a free standing set of rules in itself. This supplement covers actions fought under, on, and over, water with emphasis on the activities of submarines and other submersibles.

As well as extra rules to use with Hellfire there are also three scenarios, two of which are written to be solo campaigns. (but can also be played against opponents.)

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Zombie Knight Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Zombie Knight Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, DISCARD 4 cards. Each time a Unicorn card in your Stable is sacrficed or destroyed, return it to your hand.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Dark Matron Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Dark Matron Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE an Upgrade card. Each time a Unicorn card in your Stable is sacrificed, you may bring a Baby Unicorn card from the Nursery into your Stable.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Draconic Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Draconic Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, you may DISCARD 2 Basic Unicorn cards. If you do, take another turn.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Espresso Oracle Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Espresso Oracle Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, you may: STEAL an Upgrade card and DRAW a card.
- - OR - -
Move a Downgrade card in your Stable to another player's Stable and DRAW a card.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Mystic Rainbow Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Mystic Rainbow Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, DISCARD your hand. Each time another player moves a Magic card to the discard pile after playing it, you may add that card to your hand.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Portal Master Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Portal Master Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE 2 cards, then STEAL a card. If this card is in your Stable at the beginning of your turn, you may pull a card at random from another player's hand.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Sentinel Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Sentinel Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE a Unicorn card. Each time another player plays an Instant card, you may DRAW a card.

boardgame: Unstable Unicorns: Siren Unicorn Promo Card
description:
This mystery blind box introduces 10 exclusive new characters to add to your arsenal. Each of these vinyl mini figures includes an Unstable Unicorns promo card with effects that you’ve never seen before. Collect them all and build the most magical army of all time!

Buy one figure at a time for a mystery surprise, or get the pack of 18 with a guarantee that you'll find all 10 figures! The surprise is half the fun, so all Vinyl Figure Blind Box sales are final.

Card Text:
Siren Unicorn
Ultimate Unicorn card
When this card enters your Stable, SACRIFICE or DESTROY up to 3 Downgrade cards, then bring the same number of Basic Unicorn cards from your hand into your Stable.

Family Pastimes Cards is a deck of 64 playing cards consisting of nine different symbols. The symbols represent different aspects of life: Mu (mystery card or mumba), T (time element), U (universe), M (man), W (woman), A (animal), F (force or natural forces), V (vegetation), and S (earth or soil).

Mu and T cards do not contain a digit. The other symbols' cards make up a set of one card without a digit, and cards with 1, 2, and 3 as digits.

There are several games that can be played with Family Pastimes Cards. The deck comes with rules for one game called Family, the object of which is to harmonize into one unit the different aspects of life by building seven families, each family consisting of seven different symbols of the same digit (or blank).

Based on the mega-popular Nickelodeon show, play with the new PAW Patrol Path Game from Spin Master Games! In this path game for kids ages 4-8, it’s all paws on deck! The team has many missions to accomplish, but anything is pawsible! It’s time to play, rescue, repeat! Start at the Paw Patrol Tower and roll the die to begin. Move around the board according to the dice! Deliver all your mission tokens to the center to win! For 2-4 players, this is a simple board game for kids 4 and up. Be the first to deliver all your mission tokens to the gameboard center and join the team for victory in this game for family game night! This game for girls and boys features all of your kids’ favorite pups including Chase, Marshall, Skye, and Everest.

—description from the publisher

In this game you roll a die, and move that many spaces around the board. If you land on a mission token space, you get a mission token. If you land on a Mayor Humdinger Space, you lose a mission token. If you land on a bone, you get a small shortcut that lands on a mission token space. You do one lap around the board to get back to the tower and deliver your tokens to the center of the board.

boardgame: Casting Call: HORROR MOVIE Expansion Pack
description: Dying to be famous? Kill for a good part? This Horror Movie expansion pack for Casting Call: The Game offers macabre movie scripts, creepy callbacks, and sinister star cards. Rest in peace because you’ll soon hit the big time!

boardgame: Casting Call: ADULTS ONLY Expansion Pack
description: Ready to sleep your way to the top? This Adults-Only expansion pack for Casting Call: The Game offers mouthwatering movie scripts, crass callbacks, and sexy star cards. Hollywood’s casting couch calls!

Step into the role of a wizard competing in the ultimate potion-brewing championship! In Potions Master Tournament, you’ll gather rare ingredients from mystical locations—like the Forest, Beach, Meadow, and Swamp—to craft powerful recipes and outscore your rivals.

Players draw ingredient cards from mystical locations—Forest, Beach, Meadow, and Swamp. Each location has a unique prevalence of ingredients, while the Swamp contains rare ingredients and Forgotten Potions. Ingredients are not all equal; the same ingredient (e.g., an apple) can have different point values, adding an extra layer of strategy to your choices.

—description from the designer

Craft powerful potions by combining the exact number of ingredients specified on Recipe cards. Completing recipes rewards players with special effects and valuable points.

Familiar Abilities:
Play Familiars, magical companions with unique abilities, to gain advantages like peeking at cards, disrupting opponents, or securing rare ingredients. To activate their powers, you must “feed” them specific ingredients.

Forgotten Potions:
Found in the Swamp, these special cards add a twist. Some act as wild cards, substituting for any ingredient in a recipe. Others, however, are detrimental, subtracting points if left in your hand at the end of the game.

Game End Conditions:
The game ends when a player completes three recipes or when any Location deck runs out. Players calculate their scores based on ingredients used in recipes, subtracting points for unused Forgotten Potions.

Emporio is a mid-weight medieval conquest game where players race to collect 12 diamonds and claim the title of King. The game offers a rich “empire-building” experience, blending action selection, dice-based resource and combat mechanics, building placement, area control, tactical cards, and negotiation.

There are seven different ways to earn diamonds, and only two involve combat, allowing players to explore contrasting strategies. Whether you focus on construction, warfare, or clever tactical play, Emporio is designed to be adaptable, interactive, and highly replayable.

—description from the designer

Get The Picture is the ultimate name-dropping party game where you sound out the images on each card to form the name of a famous person, character, or band. It's fast, easy, and fun!

Each game card has images that, when sounded out in order, form a famous name. It's pretty straight-forward: whoever guesses the most cards right wins.

—description from the publisher

Welcome to Archazia's Island, where friendly pets abound! Beyond the cast of cuddly critters, lies an ancient secret just waiting to be discovered...

Disney Lorcana: Archazia's Island introduces dual-ink glimmers to this collectible card game. Dual-ink cards are powerful because each ink has certain limitations, but by combining multiple inks you can get combinations of abilities that are otherwise impossible. All that power comes at a cost, though: You can use the card only if your deck matches both of its ink types.

—description from the publisher

Christmas is in danger this year! The elves in Santa's workshop have lost the Christmas present lists and now they must forge them before grumpy Santa discovers the disaster. If he finds out, the elves will face a punishment even worse than a winter without a job. In this exciting game, you must create the fake lists and avoid Santa's wrath - Christmas is in your hands!

In this spectacular party game you must write lists of gifts, but you must be careful that other players don't end up erasing your entire list. Be the best and get the most points to be the winner of Santa's List.

Originally available during the Dice Tower 2025 Gamefound campaign (pack D "dagon").

These tiles are added during setup to urban building spaces with a red border and 2 Thalers cost and provide you with a bonus, when you build there.

boardgame: Syndicate: Котики и Власть (Syndicate Cats and Power)
description:
SyndiCate is a game from the Party Game category. Players need to compete for the right to become the Boss of a criminal syndicate. To do this, you need to perform "Tasks" and accumulate authority. There are 4 groups of tasks in the game that give authority points (1,2,3,6). The themes of the illustrations and the description immerse you in the crazy criminal Cat world.

There are several categories of cards in the game, which either help the player or complicate the game for other opponents. The average game time is 15-30 minutes, the number of players is from 2-6.

A brief description of the game mechanics.
A player can play up to 5 cards from his hand on his turn, and you can only take cards from the deck at the end of the turn. To get authority points, the player needs to collect a combination of "Strength" points in color and/or quantity, lay out the cards under the "Task" on his turn and put his token on top. The number of tasks is limited, but they can be released and the enemy token can be reset - the task will become available to all players again. To do this, the game has a category of "Kus" cards - these are traps that can be laid face down over any task. So that no one else knows which trap is blocking the task.

These cards can either block an empty task, or be placed on tasks where someone's token is already lying.
The tasks have varying difficulty and are divided into 4 color categories (Green, Blue, Red, Black) from simple to complex. So in order to complete the green task, only 2 power points are enough, 3 for blue, 4 for red, and to complete the black task, you need to collect a certain combination of color and / or face value.
There are 80 cards, rules and tokens in the set.

There are also 2 other categories of cards in the game:
"Interaction" and "Snap cards"
cards of "Interaction" - help the player, give the opportunity to pick up the card from the player, look at the "Kus" lying on the table, etc.
"Snap" cards - in order to interfere with the players. For example, to remove the opponent's power cards from the table or to arrange an "Ambush"

—description from the designer

boardgame: Das große Piratenspiel mit der Maus
description:
This is a dice roll game for learning the alphabet, featuring the famous German child television character "Die Maus".

Roll a dice and move forward. After landing on a field showing a letter of the alphabet, you have to tell three words starting with this letter. If you succeed, you'll earn a piece of gold.

There are variants for older kids.

—user summary
The classic Monopoly with constructions and other elements of Rybnik, a city in Poland.

At last, a fast, fun and simple word game. All you have to do is make 4-letter words, and everyone can do it! But when you add penalties, you need a bit of strategy and guile to win!!

Traq mo is a word game in which you assemble square tiles to form words. Each tile is divided into four sections, each containing a syllable. The aim is to create words with adjacent tiles to force other players to draw new tiles. The first player to get rid of his tiles wins.

Themed around items needed for a holiday, collect the items to fill your board and shout bingo to win. Contains 4 bingo boards, 20 picture cards and 34 bingo counters. Each player choses a bingo board. The picture cards are shuffled and placed face down on the table. Players take it in turn to flip over a picture card. If the card matches a picture on the players board they cover it with a counter. The winner is the first to cover their entire board.

Match rhyming pairs to make silly sentences, then feed them to the slime monster in this fun rhyming game.

Players start with a selection of five green slime cards. Taking it in turns they choose a purple slime card - if the card rhymes with one of the cards in front of them, the player must think of a silly sentence using the two words. Once they have a rhyming sentence they spin the spinner to find out in what style they must say their silly sentence in: whilst either holding their nose, with their teeth together, or in a squeaky voice!

Once they've said their funny sentence, they post their cards into the 3D slime monster. The winner is the first player to post all their green cards into the slime monsters mouth.

—description from the publisher

A game to develop children's English skills and work out rhyming pairs of words with the added fun of saying them in a silly way.
Game contains 44 cards with different words on them. The player has to match two rhyming words together then spin the spinner to find out which silly way they have to say the rhyme before posting the words through the mouth of the 3D slime monster.

The players take turns to roll and move. On some spaces the players have to drop Smarties into a hole in the game board. The first player to reach space 71 wins the game and all Smarties under the game board.

—user summary

Match the colour and the shape on the dice or discs to the monsters on the players bingo board. The first player to cover their board completely wins. Younger players can flip over the picture discs whilst older players can roll teh dice to find their monsters.

Learn the letters of the alphabet in this fun lotto game! Choose which side of the board you play on and try and be the first player to find all the cards that match the letters or pictures on your lotto board. There are 4 different ways to play: matching picture to picture, letter to picture, picture to letter or letter to letter! The different play styles develop with children's ability, from a simple picture matching lotto to more complex picture to letter matching - requiring children to think about the spelling of different words from their head.

—description from the publisher

Playing to help teach letter recognition and develop early reading skills. Players can chose 4 ways of playing from matching pictures and letters.

Match letters to the coloured post boxes in this single player activity or multi-player game. In the simple version of the game, players take it in turns to match and post letters into the correctly coloured post box - a great way to introduce turn taking to young players. In the more advanced game, players pick a post box and must be the first to post all the letters which match this colour to win the game!

—description from the publisher

Helping children with their colour identification. Player poster letters through post boxes of the same colour to help develop their hand eye co-ordination as well as their memory skills.
family: Theme: Mail / Stamps / The Post Office

description: A collection of 3 activities in one box. Chose between playing the Farm Race Game where the players collect animals as they make their way through Old Mcdonalds farm by matching the colours on the dice. Farm match where players match the baby animals with their mothers and their homes, and Farm Jigsaw Puzzle where players actively spot different animals on the large jigsaw.

Embark on a magical spelling adventure with Magic Spelling, a teacher-tested game by Orchard Toys. For 2-4 players aged 5-7 years, this engaging game challenges players to find letters with a magic wand before time runs out. Self-checking word cards add a magical touch with a rub and reveal coating. The first player to collect all ingredients and cast their spell wins!

—description from the publisher

Use the magic wand to reveal the hidden letters on the spell cards to spell out the word cards and fill out your spell book before the time runs out.

While these cards aren't infused with mystical and magical power, the deck does contain everything you need to play an original card game, complete with its own ruleset, themed around the adventure and magic of Dungeon Drafters.

Included with the Dungeon Drafters Deluxe Edition.  Card game with 81 cards and rulebook.

Sixteen additional ships to expand your fleets:  2 Battleships, 2 Cruisers, 4 Destroyers, and 8 Frigates.  Includes pre-painted ship minis, flight stands, and all cardboard tokens required to base the ships properly.

The original Kickstarter "Admiral Pledge" included one bag of this product, and you could also order them as add-ons during the campaign.  Eight ship miniatures per faction were included.  The base game supported up to four players, and by adding enough extra of this set, you could (in theory) crank the game up to a 20 player count.

Instant Workshop...  Infinite Possibilities!

Build adorable robots and golems, with just one finger!

Widget’s Workshop is a “drop-style,” spatial set collection, card crafting board game. You start the game by dropping 80 part cards onto the table, creating a giant, messy pile of parts in the center. Players take turns pulling parts from the pile, using one finger only, attempting to find the best parts for their robots and golems under construction in their workshop bays. Once a bay contains each of the 5 required pieces, the parts are combined to reveal a unique construct and its name.

You win the game by completing the most optimized set of constructs in your workshop!

Prepare to drop some parts and build awesome constructs!

Highlights:

     Innovative "drop-style" game set in the Dungeon Drop universe
     Highly portable, small-box game playable in under 30 minutes
     Elements of card crafting and set collection
     Real-world, spatial gameplay


On your turn you will draft either 1 face-down part card from the pile, or 2 face-up parts (choosing one to keep and then tossing the other back onto the pile face-up). Drafted part cards are added to one of your three "bays" where you're constructing these robots and golems. Once you have all 5 parts necessary to complete a construct, you assemble it (consolidate the cards, allowing the completed construct picture to show through the transparent areas of the cards) and move it to your "showcase" area. Once a certain number of constructs have been completed the game end triggers - the player with the highest scoring constructs wins!

—description from the publisher
family: Organizations: Game Designers of North Carolina

description:
A competitive strategy game about scientific translation during the Golden Age of Islam. Use your resources to travel across the Empire, collect texts, and recruit scholars. Use your Scholars cards to translate and study the books in the House of Wisdom and advance your scientific knowledge across four different fields of study, try to fulfill the Caliph’s demands to earn extra victory points!

—description from the designer

boardgame: Molehill Meadows: Early Bird Promo Card
description:
Limited edition "Early Bird" promo card part of the Gamefound campaign.
It adds a new 5-square tunnel card for more variation.

The Battle of Crete was a turning point. The Germans, shocked by their heavy losses, limited the use of their paratroopers to conventional infantry roles. In contrast, the Allies, recognizing the potential of these troops, integrated them into their airborne forces for future operations like Overlord or Market Garden. In this wargame, you’ll face critical decisions.

As the Axis, you must carefully select your initial targets, exploiting the element of surprise to secure airfields and ports. Effective deployment will allow you to receive reinforcements and consolidate your control over the island, preventing the Allied troops from escaping to Egypt.

As the Allies, your mission is to defend key points with tenacity, using your best units to launch counterattacks and slow down the enemy advance. Even if you lose Crete, you still have a chance to achieve victory by evacuating troops to Egypt and inflicting heavy losses on the enemy.

Can the Axis conquer Crete without sacrificing their valuable paratrooper division? Or will the Allies manage to resist and change the course of the war?

—description from the publisher

Tajemství Býčí skály is a competitive family game where players explore caves in Moravian Karst. Players represent cave explorers in 19th century, exploring the caves and trying to find historical findings they can bring into the museum.

At the beginning of the game, players draw four hexes and place their meeple at the cave entrance.

Each turn, they then can use one of the hexes to expand the discovered cave system. The placed hex either gives the player some victory points (represented here as golden diamond pieces), or contains some secrets to be excavated. These secrets are represented by card with an X on them.

The players can then either move their meeples, or they can excavate and uncover one card on hex they are standing on. The card may contain archaeological treasure or perhaps some action they can use in the next turns.

The game ends when either all VP diamonds are depleted, or no cards can be placed. The player with the most VPs is the overall winner.

500 questions on 100 cards.
On the cards are the most diverse questions about the popular characters such as Ruffy, Zorro, Nami and co.

Isle of Thrift is an economic board game for 2 to 6 players that requires strategic thinking, investment skills, and social interaction.

Players take on the role of entrepreneurs in a competitive business world, investing in various sectors or focusing on specific sectors to establish market dominance.
The objective is to gain advantages from these sectors, reach enough wealth, and collect all the space cards to win the game.

Game Mechanics

Movement: Each player moves 1 space on their turn (this number can change with Attribution Cards).

Map and Properties: The game board features 58 spaces, 44 of which are purchasable properties. Most of these properties either provide the owner with distinct benefits or attract other players who need access to their services.

Sectors and Tycoon Cards:
There are 12 sectors in the game, each offering unique advantages to players. To fully benefit from a sector, players must control all properties within it and acquire the corresponding Tycoon Card.

Chance Games and Investment Tools:
Players can engage with investment tools such as stock, exchanges, and crypto on Stock Market property, or participate in games of chance at Casino and Hippodrome properties.

Attribution Cards:
These are critical to the game’s strategy, providing players with benefits like protection, attacks, movement boosts, profit increases, and discounts.
Attribution Cards can be traded between players and are central to strategic decision-making.

Digital Integration
Isle of Thrift introduces innovative digital features to enhance the board game experience.
Players can scan the QR code on the game box to access the website, where they can track fluctuating stock, exchange, and crypto values and trade related cards during gameplay.
Chance games like roulette and horse racing, available at Casino and Hippodrome properties, are also played through the website.

—description from the designer

Have you been together for years, or is tonight your first date? Date Night is the perfect game to play together and find out how well you know each other and how well you match!

If you had to eat the same thing every day for a year, would you choose sushi or pizza? And does your date know that? Do you prefer a romantic comedy over an action movie?

Play together and learn surprising things about each other to get to know each other (even) better. Have fun on your date!

—description from the publisher (translated)

boardgame: 新版中文拼字遊戲-上下組合 (Chinese Character Puzzle Game: Top-Bottom Combinations)
description:
Chinese Character Puzzle Game: Top-Bottom Combinations selects 108 highly combinable radicals and components to create character-building puzzle pieces (144 plastic pieces in total, including 6 blank pieces that can be used as wildcards). Using a top-bottom combination format, this game enables the formation of over 300 different Chinese characters.

Each piece is assigned a score according to the difficulty of recognizing the character. The game includes 10 different ways to play, making learning enjoyable through play. The set comes with an instruction manual detailing the 10 gameplay methods, a reference table of possible character combinations, and basic knowledge about Chinese characters. Additionally, 6 small stands are included for use during gameplay.

In the game the team chooses a task and bets with the opposing team that they will not be able to complete it. The more likely they think the opposite team fails, the higher they evaluate the bet in the range of 1 to 3 points. The goal is to get a certain number of points.
There are three types of tasks: creative, motor and spoken.

Interested in a game that allows you to escape the rush of daily life? Something to give your mind a gentle exercise? Sparrow's Knot effortlessly combines entertainment and relaxation, inviting you to unwind, relax, and challenge yourself at your own pace.

Clear the grid after drawing all 36 cards.

While it may seem straightforward, success hinges on your ability to plan ahead and avoid finding yourself with unusable cards on the grid.

Overview on How To Play:

     Draw & Build: Draw cards one at a time to build a 4x4 layout.
     Create Sets: Form Sets by placing cards with matching or sequential values next to each other.
     Clear the Grid: Remove Sets to free up space and move you closer to winning.
     Use Card Abilities: Unlock and utilize your cleared Sets' abilities to rearrange the grid.

A long time ago, in the lands of ancient China, lived a maiden amidst mist-kissed mountain peaks, burdened by her wicked step family. Her beauty rivaled the first light of dawn, and her gentleness was akin to a moonbeam—pure and fair. Even her wit charmed all who crossed her path, including the Emperor himself. Now, he has tasked you and the rest of his imperial advisors with bringing the girl to him so they could be united in a grand ceremony for the ages. As destiny beckons, will you embrace this challenge and bring honor to your family's name?

Ye Xian is a card game inspired by the Chinese fairy tale of Cinderella. In the game for 3 - 6 players, take on the role of imperial advisors searching for the maiden who captured the Emperor's heart. Use deduction and strategy to outwit your opponents and bring the couple together. Succeeding will earn you the Emperor's favor, and bring honor to your family's name.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Freedom Five: Team Up Pack – Guise and Chrono-Ranger
description: Two new playable Heroes (Guise and Chrono-Ranger), including their Ability Cards, Player Boards, Personal Task Cards and any special tokens.

Something is amiss among the Freedom Five. Your gear is rusty, your intel is lacking, and your coffee is weak. Ominous whispers fill the streets as evil stirs beneath the city surface. Where will you turn when you don't know who to trust?

Continue the Freedom Five campaign with six puzzling new scenario comics in Freedom Five: Rubble & Ruin! Grow your team with Unity — a powerful new hero — and face off against wicked Masterminds and terrifying Villains as you take down the Freedom Five's biggest threats yet.

Poleana is a game that became popular in Mexican prisons, in Ciudad del Mexico, as it can be played with a set of dice and a numbered board, it represents a metaphor for the prisoner's life inside the jail, and its chase for freedom.
It is said to be called Poleana from the short slang "Pole" which means Police, it should represent also the escape from police, also seen as "Police and Thieves" (Policias y Ladrones.
However it is also said to be a simple derivation from the popular game "Pollyanna".

Poleana loosely follows the rules of Pachisi and Sorry, It is played on a square wooden box with a sunken center to roll 2 d6 dices. Four players, each with four squared colored pieces, race to navigate the board, for each 6 casted (in either combination of the two dices) the player can "release" a piece from the "jail", if the player rolls two 6s, two pieces can be released and moved onto the board, if a player casts 6 - 3, then one piece is released while a second piece is placed on the "soon to be released" 3 spot. 
If there are sufficient free pieces, a player can choose to either use the sum of its dices to move one piece (5+2), which moves one piece or move one piece forward of 5 places and another 2 places onwards.
On the opposite side of the table is your "opponent", so it's a 1vs1 and 1vs1 game. Same as in Sorry! If your piece goes in the same tile of an enemy's player the piece returns to "jail".
The game is over when a player gets all his 4 coloured tiles around the board and into the "exit zone" (which is the designated colored corner).

boardgame: 新版中文拼字遊戲-左右組合 (Chinese Character Puzzle Game: Left-Right Combination)
description:
The Chinese Character Puzzle Game: Left-Right Combinations features 138 highly combinable radicals and components, crafted into 144 plastic puzzle pieces (including 6 blank wildcard pieces) that use a left-right combination format to create over 800 different Chinese characters.

Each piece is scored based on character recognition difficulty, and the game offers 10 different ways to play, blending learning with fun. The set includes an instruction manual detailing the 10 gameplay methods, a reference table of character combinations, basic knowledge about Chinese characters, and 6 stands for use during gameplay.

boardgame: 新版中文拼詞遊戲 (New Chinese Spelling Game)
description:
There are 118 commonly used words with high word-building potential and created 176 puzzle pieces (including 8 wildcard pieces), designing the Chinese Word Formation Game, which allows for the creation of over 2,000 words.

Through four engaging games, players can exercise their minds while learning and practising word formation, making it easier to apply vocabulary in real-life contexts with confidence and ease. Learning Chinese becomes effortless and fun through play!

Players have to stick together to win Buzzy Bear!

In this kid's game developed in partnership with Fisher-Price, two to four players work as a team to collect enough honey before winter comes. Players shake the bear to find out how many tiles to flip on their turn, then begin their hunt for honey. Flip a snowflake tile and winter comes a step closer! The goal is to fill everyone's honeycomb board before winter arrives to win.

Three different levels of play match the growing abilities of pre-schoolers as they practice memory and cooperation skills.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Black Skin Black Shirt: Ethiopia vs. Fascist Italy 1935-37
description:
ETHIOPIA VS. FASCIST ITALY 1935-1937

A Prelude to the Second World War

Fascist Italy's 1935 invasion of Ethiopia set the world on course for World War Two. The failure of the League of Nations to deter Fascist aggression led to policies of appeasement, the rise of the Axis, the Spanish Civil War, and Hitler's march into the Rhineland. In this easy-to-play, straightforward solitaire game, you are the beleaguered Ethiopian Emperor Haile Selassie I (1892-1975). Take charge of Ethiopia's defenses, call up troops, and call on the League of Nations as Italy tries to enlarge her empire at your expense.

Send your regional "Ras" warlords into battle, organize partisans, deploy your limited elite forces, and endure Italy's criminal use of mustard gas.

Your ancient Black Christian African civilization stands as a defiant symbol of anti-colonial resistance and as the first battlefield of the coming global struggle against Fascist aggression. Can you turn Mussolini's Blackshirt armies back, prevent the fall of Ethiopia's capital Addis Ababa, and change the course of history?

—description from the publisher

You gradually uncover cards and visit planets and moons. You have to avoid dead ends and overcome obstacles. With a bit of luck and tactics, you'll rack up the most points and win.

—description from the publisher

A major fire has broken out! One by one, you lay water pipes to the firefighters. You can only score points and save the houses from the sea of flames if you lay them cleverly or build over existing ones.

—description from the publisher

Whoever has collected all the ingredients for the Schwarzwälder Kirsch (Black Forrest Cherry) cake wins. Play it safe and only take one card per turn or try your luck by grabbing several ingredients in one go. But if you pick an ingredient twice, you lose everything and start all over again.

—description from the publisher

Today is the rabbit sports festival. So run quickly to the clubhouse with your rabbit. On your way, remember the rabbit food on the route cards. Then you'll make faster progress. With secrecy and tip option for advanced rabbits!

Movement mechanism:

     Roll the die and move the rabbit of the same colour. 
     Afterwards flip over a path card (you have to choose the card before or after the rabbit you moved in step 1) and see what you find: If you find one or two rabbit-foods, the rabbits of the same colour move forward. If you find a snail, the last rabbit moves forward. 


—description from the designer
A game where players compete by guessing characters from the danish television extended universe of "Ramasjang" using as few hints as possible.

Cult game from the 80s where players take on the role of ambitious entrepreneurs who try to expand their industry by buying raw materials, transforming them and selling the finished products; whoever earns more than the others by doing all this will be the winner.

boardgame: Города: Москва/Санкт-Петербург Промо (Cities: Moscow/Saint Petersburg Promo
description: Expand the basic Cities game with a new achievement board. That includes the main attractions of the cities of Moscow and Saint Petersburg for even more variety.

This anniversary expansion contains:


     3 blood-stained dice (D6, D10 & D12)
     A dice tower
     New cards with new heroes, etc.
     Corpse eater markers
     Labyrinth tiles
     Fallen hero tiles

In this memo game with a twist, players uncover and collect either individual starfish or pairs of animals. They also search for a treasure for each diver - and hopefully find enough to win before the sun goes down.

Chief Sitting Bear leads the Mkwa Tribe posse, a powerful force rooted in tradition and resilience. When his son, Elsu, and his friends mysteriously vanish, Sitting Bear sets aside his hard-fought peace to take up arms and search for them, driven by a father’s love and duty. Alongside him is Muraco, the tribe’s wise and mystical medicine man, and Akando, a skilled warrior whose mastery of javelins and martial arts make him a fearsome ally. Together, this trio brings a unique blend of spiritual power, precision combat, and unyielding determination to the battlefield, ready to protect their tribe and face any threat that stands in their way.

—description from the publisher

La Garde Veille! (The Guard is on Watch!) is a Tactical level original module for the Jours de Gloire series, set at battalion scale, inserted in VaeVictis magazine #178.

It covers Guard’s actions during the Battle of Eylau. The first scenario cover 1st Battalion of Grenadiers à pied regiment against a Russian column approaching Eylau’s cimetary and village. The second one is dedicated to the charge of the Grenadier à cheval regiment at the end of the famous Murat’s cavalry charge.

The scale is 100 m per hexagon and one Strength Point corresponds to about 200 infantry, 150 cavalry or 2 guns. The game includes two maps, one per scenario. The game lenghth is 4 or 5 turns, each covering 15 minutes of real time. A game of La Garde veille! should last around 1 hour.

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Players: Wargames with Rules Supporting Only Two Players

description:
Additional parts to add more players to the game.  The base game supported up to four players, the addition of this expansion allowed up to eight players.  With enough extra ships though, you could in theory support twenty player games.

This bagged expansion came with every "Admiral" pledge of Genesis, and could be ordered as an add-on.  Included two punchboards and 18 engraved dice.  One punchboard was for the extra Player Command Boards, and the second gave you identifying "gears" to add to the ship's flight stands to delineate different player alignments.

boardgame: BattleTech: Black Remnant Command Lance Forcepack
description:
Nothing Hurts Like Family

Stavrenn Otho leads his ragtag team of mercenaries on high-risk missions across hundreds of light-years, but the greatest threat to his battle-forged unit may come from those of his own blood.

Unleash the Black Remnant Command Lance, straight out of Penny Arcade's streaming BattleTech campaign! Includes the Dragon Fire (with optional bits to create the DGR-3F and new DGR-9D variants), the Blood Asp I, Flashman, and Cyclops—no assembly required—along with four MechWarrior pilot cards and four Alpha Strike cards. Perfect for BattleTech and Alpha Strike action!

—description from the back of the box

Shuffle the decks, and deal 7 meme cards to each player.  Place the picture cards face down. The first judge flips up a photo and every one else tries to pick their best meme cards to make the funniest set. Keep doing this till someone gets enough points and wins.
family: Religious: Church of Jesus Christ of Latter-day Saints

description:
In Hagamos una Expo, you play as a staff member of the Chilean National History Museum, working alongside your colleagues to create this season's exhibition under the guidance of the Director. During the game, you will receive donated artifacts that must be cataloged, researched for their origins and history, and prepared for display. Through teamwork, you and your colleagues will assemble an exhibition, but you must be cautious of the potential risks involved in the process. Will you be able to fulfill the Director's request?

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Tiletum: Prospect for Silver – Stone Tablets mini-expansion
description:
Originally available during the Prospect for Silver Spieleschmiede campaign.

Set of Stone Tablet tiles, that match the ones printed on the Underground maps side boards in the Prospect for Silver.
These are randomized during setup, to bring more variability.

Quanta 5 is a versatile dice-based strategy game that blends luck and skill for an engaging experience in both one-on-one and team formats. Rooted in balance, teamwork, and calculated risk-taking, the game challenges players to achieve the perfect synergy of numbers and strategy, making it ideal for gatherings with family and friends.

In the 2-player mode, Quanta 5 is a head-to-head battle where each player competes to achieve two “quanta” (five tokens in a row, column, or diagonal) on a BINGO-style grid. Players roll six 10-sided dice (D10s) to form strategic number combinations, such as “Royal Sets” (six of the same number) or “Royal Series” (six consecutive numbers), allowing them to place tokens on the board while blocking their opponent’s progress.

In the 4-player mode, the game becomes a cooperative challenge, with two teams of two working together to achieve victory. Teammates must rely on silent strategy, as table talk is not allowed, adding depth and intensity to every roll and decision. Players must anticipate their partner’s intentions and work cohesively to outmaneuver the opposing team.

Quanta 5 stands out with its mix of push-your-luck mechanics, vibrant playmat designs, and adaptability for any skill level. Whether played competitively or casually, its unique blend of silent teamwork and strategic gameplay creates an unforgettable experience.

—description from the designer

In ReminiSéance, players are mediums holding a séance to help a spirit recover its lost memory fragment, "the Reminiscence". Each medium starts with tarot cards pointing to different memory fragments of the spirit. Players must collaborate by sharing "Psychic Readings" with each other and performing "Tarot Readings" with the spirit to identify the missing fragment. When a player believes they’ve found the Reminiscence, they ring the bell and announce it.

But beware... Among the mediums hides a charlatan, who starts with fake tarot cards and doesn’t know any memory fragments. Mediums rely on intuition and deduction to spot the charlatan and uncover the Reminiscence, while the charlatan buys time through lies and deception. Only the first to ring the bell can win by correctly naming the Reminiscence, but a wrong guess hands victory to the opposing team.

The game combines logic and social deduction, with the charlatan role designed for easy, fun deception. Quick to set up and play, ReminiSéance offers an immersive experience of intuition, collaboration, and intrigue.

—description from the designer
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Six more reality-twisting maps for Maglev Metro!

Welcome to the World of Tomorrow! State-or-the-art magnetic levitation technology has allowed for newer, faster, and stealthier transportation for both humans and robots. Civilization is expanding to modern cities across the globe, to the quantum realm, and even to the edge of the netherworld.

Maglev Maps: Volume 2 adds six more maps to the Maglev Metro series, expanding the series to 14 reality-twisting maps. Each map offers a unique ruleset, distinctive components, and challenging strategies to explore.

Maps for Barcelona, Chicago, Ghost Train, Nanobots Inc, Nanotech University, The Outback.

Civilizations are built upon the technological innovations of past eras, the ambitions and ideas of people who left their mark on the course of time, and the social advancements demanded by each moment in history. Some of these events, structures, and ideas remain to this day, while others form part of the sediment that shapes our slice of History.

In Patchistory: The Fabric of Ages, you will develop civilizations through an auction system where you acquire a series of tiles that will overlap and interweave, evoking the art of patchwork. Over the course of three eras, you will grow your population, produce, and manage the resources generated by your territory.  
You will explore beyond your borders, facing or allying with neighboring civilizations. Leaders will rise and fall, swept away by the tides of time. You will construct monuments that reflect the glory of your people—perhaps fleetingly.

At the end of three eras, the player with the most Culture points wins the game, ensuring their civilization will never be erased from History.

Patchistory: The Fabric of Ages reimplements the cult-classic Patchistory adding new variants to offer a quicker game without losing the deepness and fun of the original. Some minor adjustments are made to make a smoother experience and added a solitaire mode to this original approach to civilization games.

boardgame: The Ultimate TV Trivia Game: Bingeworthy
description:
Pull up a chair and tune in to a new kind of party entertainment - the Ultimate TV Trivia Game! Reminisce, recall, and remember the trivia and the not-so-trivial from TV's most bingeworthy shows: Friends, Game of Thrones, It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia, and The Simpsons!

TV fanatics can test their knowledge in six categories, including:

     Who Said That? - identify quotes from characters, theme songs, and taglines
     Where Did It Happen? - match characters and tv shows to their locations
     Blankety Blanks - fill in the blank(s); It's All Relative - test knowledge about social, familial, and business relationships
     Real Life - answer questions about the people and gossip behind the scenes
     WILD - answer a question from the category of your choice.


This card game can be played by itself or as an expansion pack to The Ultimate TV Trivia Game.
family: Books: A Song of Ice and Fire

boardgame: Blast from the Past Trivia Game: 2000s
description:
Get ready to bust out your iPod, slip on a pair of Ugg boots, and enjoy a Blast from the Past! Now's your chance to take a trip back through the 2000s and test your nostalgic know-how. You may be surprised at how much you remember - and how much you totally tried to forget!

This expansion includes 80 trivia cards with four categories:

     Hot or Not - decide whether or not the stated trend was popular during the decade
     Memory Lane - test knowledge about pop culture and subjects that made headlines during the decade
     Hit Parade - answer questions about the music of the decade
     Dead or Alive - decide whether or not the stated person was alive during the selected decade.


Blast from the Past 2000s Expansion' is ideal for millennials who are always down for reliving those prime nostalgic years. This card game can be played by itself or as an expansion pack to Blast from the Past (60s, 70s, 80s, and 90s).

—description from the publisher

Full buckets, happy hearts, kinder world! How will you fill your bucket with kindness? Friends move around the board gathering kindness hearts to fill their buckets. Watch out and don't be a bucket spiller or you will lose all your hearts!

Players read action cards and vote on whether actions are bucket fillers or bucket spillers. The first player to cross the finish line is awarded a kindness heart token. Play continues until all players have crossed the finish line on the game board. Players then count their kindness heart tokens. The player with the most hearts at the end of the game is the winner! Bucket Full of Kindness is the perfect game for teaching kids acts of kindness.

boardgame: Fistful of Lead: Glorious Adventures in the Age of Steam
description:
It is truly a wondrous age! It seems a new invention destined to change the world is created every day. Babbage’s Analytical Engine has transformed modern mathematics and made complex calculations capable of changing the world. Edison’s Aether ships ply the space ways making interplanetary travel a daily occurrence. Tesla has made electric power plentiful, and advances in steam technology have made the impossible possible.

Of course, none of these advances in science would be possible without the discovery of X-Matter in 1869. When this miracle element is combined with other substances it can make metals lighter and stronger, and make fuels burn hotter. Even members of the occult societies claim X-Matter has a mystical effect on reality itself.

All this new technology has quickly found its way to the battlefield. Soldiers march to war resplendent in their colorful uniforms, armed with the newest, deadliest weapons. And the march to war beside monstrous, steam belching machines; airships, armored walkers, submersibles and landships.

Glorious Adventures in the Age of Steam is a standalone game. 
People who already own a Fistful of Lead game will notice the core mechanics are unchanged. 
In this book you’ll find new equipment, weapons and exotic new locations with lists of inhabitants both friend and foe. 
Your adventures may take you from the haunted back alleys of London to the majestic canals of Mars. 
Or are you more in the mood for a dinosaur hunt at the center of the Earth? 
It’s all right here.

You’ll be forming a Detachment. This is a special group of extraordinary adventurers out for glory, gold and whatever services are needed by a world in turmoil. You might be working for Her (or His) Majesty, trying to save the world or conquer it. Are you working for a strange occult society or a scientific expedition? The choice is yours.

Glorious Adventures in the Age of Steam is 3 books in 1:

     Book I - Skirmishes in the Age of Steam
     Book II - Bigger Battles in the Age of Steam
     Book III - Airships in the Age of Steam

Q: What is a Red Herring?

A: The new party game that twists traditional "word definition" games on their sides!

Can you detect the real definition among the fakes? If your fish lands on a green or red buoy, choose from a list of definitions, or write your own definitions and try to fool your friends! Ever wonder where specific expressions come from? Land on a yellow buoy and you'll have to guess which origin is real and which ones are made up!

If you love party games, try Red Herring. If this sounds a little fishy, invite some friends over and try it anyway... they might just take the bait!

Welcome to Super Duper Superhero, the ultimate race to become the world's next great hero! Start your adventure at the Super Duper Superhero Headquarters, where you'll pick your starting point — whether it's the park, school, city, or home — and get ready to collect the gear you need to unlock your superpowers. Race to gather your dress-up items to earn your super powers to become the Super Duper Superhero. Use your superpowers to solve disasters and Save the World!

What is the first thing that comes to mind when you hear the word Adulting, Screwdriver, or Crocs? Maybe you thought paying bills, beverage, or a swamp animal? If not, that's okay. Read through topics and share your facts about each topic but be careful, if you give a bogus fact you may get Hoodwinked!

Share fast facts about various topics including people, places, and things. Players take turns sharing facts about the topic and play continues until a player is unable to provide a fact. If a player is unable to provide a fact within 5 seconds they pick up a Hoodwinked Card. If a player draws a Hoodwinked Card they must perform the action listed on the card. Each Hoodwinked Card can affect a player during a single round, until their next turn, or throughout the entirety of the game. Once a player draws a Hoodwinked Card they will keep it until the end of the game. The player with the fewest Hoodwinked Cards will be declared the winner - and that's a fact!

Players take on the role of allies empowered by witchcraft to drive out the occupiers threatening Ukraine. They compete to earn "Revenge Points" (RP) by strategically playing witch cards to defeat the occupier cards placed on the table.

Each occupier card has a specific strength that players must collectively overcome by placing cards with power values around it. Players also leverage special effects and power multipliers on their witch cards to maximize their contributions. Points are distributed based on individual contributions to defeating an occupier, fostering competition while requiring some cooperation.

The game ends when all the occupiers are defeated. The player with the most Revenge Points at the end of the game is declared the winner.

If you play your cards right, your life won't be in Shambles! Dan Shamble and the gang, as well as their bizarre clients and antagonists around the Unnatural Quarter, are now featured in this special edition of the Storybook Battles game from Catalyst Game Labs. Pit McGoo against the Sewer Tentacles, or Dan Shamble against the Demon Chicken, and more in this specially designed deck, for humans and unnaturals everywhere.

The Metaphor Game is the game of funny questions about the people you know, and the people you don't! Place the question cards in the middle of the table, then roll the die. The first to guess the secret identity wins!

Shuffle the deck of cards and place it face down in the middle of the play area. These are the question cards. Players place the pad of paper and a pen (not included) next to the cards. During each round one player writes down the revealer's answer after players have asked questions from the cards. The revealer starts by rolling the category die which has 6 categories written on it, including celebrities, friends, family, players, athletes, and musicians. The revealer then thinks of someone that fits the category the die lands on then writes the name down and hides it so other players can't see the answer. Players then take turns drawing cards and asking the Revealer a question. It's the ultimate game of family fun!

Rust & Rebellion is a 2-8 player competitive survival game set in a post-apocalyptic steampunk world. Lead your band of survivors through a devastated landscape as you scavenge for resources, fend off threats, and face grueling dilemmas that will shape your journey.

Each playthrough introduces a new, unpredictable apocalypse—from alien invasions and rampaging kaiju to swarms of mechanized insects and demonic incursions.

Players must manage resources and prepare for each round's crisis by arranging your survivors into 1 of 4 skill piles: Farming, Engineering, Scavenging, or Defense. The game uses betrayal dice which makes every roll unpredictable and very difficult.

Each apocalypse will dictate what conditions each player must meet in order to survive. Most apocalypses allow for multiple winners, but win rate is less than 50% of players in each party, usually leading to only 1 or 2 winners each game.

—description from the designer

An expanded and redesigned version of the original Bark Magic, Ultimutt Edition adds new wizards, spells, trials and more.

In Classic Battle, 2 to 4 players manage their hand of spell cards, using them to gain magic points (MP), thwart opponents, and dig up relics. Players compete in various dice-based trials to peek at relic cards, gain bonus MP and dig faster. The first to unearth four mystic gems from The Ruins is crowned Ultimutt Sorcerer.

In Ultimutt Battle, 2 to 8 players race to gain 7 MP in a non-stop onslaught of trials consisting of both battles and alliances. Winning means digging and relics are the only way to increase one's MP (unless they're cursed of course).

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Black Powder Red Earth 28mm: Phase Line
description:
An expansion to BPRE 28mm adding a new game mode, multi-level structures, and new unit classes.

Phase Line mode takes place over larger battlespaces than the core game with multi-level structures. As the assaulting player passes the defender's phase lines, devastating fires are employed by both sides to shape the battlespace.

The new rules also add submachine guns, general-purpose machine guns, and 40mm grenade launchers for both factions with unique mechanics.
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Arborius is an abstract strategy game that takes place over a recursive fractal board shaped by the pieces themselves, warping and deforming and reorganizing itself as pieces jump in and out of battle.

Compose your ultimate hero by nesting units together, determining your abilities and combining tiles together without limits.  Battle for domination over your opponent, and be the last standing to win.

Each collectible tile snaps and stacks together vertically.  Tiles have a direction that effects where they can move and attack.  Tiles can move inside allied or even enemy tiles, taking advantage of their abilities, and those can in turn move inside other tiles.

—description from the designer

Our game offers an alternative ending to World War II. Players represent countries that must collect their three unique flags from dangerous zones and bring them back to their capital. Afterward, they compete to retrieve the final flag on the game board and deliver it to their capital to claim victory.

The game is available in two versions: Mini (featuring 4 countries) and Premium (featuring 7 countries). Understanding the role of luck in such board games, we’ve introduced dice mechanics that enhance the strategic depth of the gameplay.

—description from the designer

Meet Hey Feelings — a one-of-a-kind experience that will steal your heart! Engaging books-n-board games, interactive worlds, and a mobile experience, all in one captivating bundle.

Hey Feelings is a lively board game where kids explore six colorful “Emotion Worlds” by moving their pawns, drawing playful Hey Cards, and collecting Emotion Crystals. Each turn, players roll the dice, land on new spots, and tackle fun challenges or answer intriguing questions about feelings. They’ll uncover how different emotions work, gain empathy, and learn to express themselves better. While collecting the most Crystals can declare a winner, the real reward is the boost in emotional awareness and positive interaction with friends and family. With three distinct game modes, surprise Booster cards, and an optional digital extension, Hey Feelings turns emotional learning into an exciting, imaginative adventure!

—description from the designer

boardgame: Magicarta: Le Fantôme de la Sorcière
description:
Enter the mysterious world of Magicarta, an evolving narrative puzzle game. You play as the ghost of a witch seeking to regain her memory and uncover the secrets of her past. Each game invites you to explore a fascinating universe, meet intriguing characters and solve puzzles to advance in your quest.

Magicarta combines captivating narration and intellectual challenges in an adventure accessible to the whole family. Discover a world that gradually unfolds as you progress, for games full of surprises and twists. Will you be able to lift the veil on your origins?

Explore the world of Magicarta on the 9 large boards forming a giant map and which will be revealed chapter after chapter.

Solve puzzles using the game boards and hidden details, Modify the environment with the event cards, collect artifact cards throughout your adventure that will help you understand the puzzle mechanics to solve.

Once your adventure is over, discover the little bonus game as a reward: Form words and advance on the game boards discovered during the puzzles for an infinite number of games. This game reuses all the elements of your adventure and will give a second wind to your equipment!

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Limits of Glory: Jersey New Jersey
description:
Two exciting games in one box, Jersey covers the little known 1781 invasion by the French of the Island of Jersey as part of the American Revolutionary War. The game examines the impact of luck on events and challenges the skill of players to use their commanders to influence these events.

New Jersey covers the famous crossing of the Delaware and the battles of Trenton and Princeton using the same 'Limits of Glory' system to test players ability to mitigate what luck throws at them by the skillful use of commanders and troop positioning.

Limits of Glory represents military campaigns at the highest command level, players take the role of theater commander and must manage their resources of men, material and skill to emerge victorious.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups
family: Series: Limits of Glory (Form Square Games)

description:
In CATCH and RUN, Players are either student penguins trying to escape, or educator penguins trying to catch the students.

The game is played on a grid of floor tiles, each with a color and a number of shapes on them. Each turn, all players select cards and a movement direction and simultaneously reveal them.

First, if possible, each player moves their penguin in the direction they revealed.

Then the played cards are evaluated. Cards show either a number, a shape, or a color. Each floor tile matching the combined aspects of the revealed cards is flipped to its destroyed side. For example, if the cards revealed are 3, 4, green, and circle, all tiles that are green with either 3 or 4 circles will be flipped.

If a penguin was on a tile that got flipped, or if a student penguin is on the same space as an educator penguin, that penguin is captured.

The educator penguins win by catching the student penguins enough times. The student penguins win by evading capture until the end of 8 rounds.

Jurassic is a module that can be added to the core game Nature to alter the experience. This module is for players who enjoy feeling invincible.

Size is Power!
It is a blessing to be big and powerful: to walk through life without looking over your shoulder, to act with impunity, untouched by the fears and anxieties others must endure. The Jurassic era reveals two distinct realities: one where ferocious predators and colossal dinosaurs battle for dominance, and another where the meek flourish in the hidden crevices, overlooked by the mighty.

Jurrasic adds a separate deck to the base game with 5 new traits, a Thagomizer die, and Jurassic size dials that increase the maximum body size from 4 to 10.

The Nature Game System
Nature allows you to combine modules to tailor the game for the players at the table.  Add Nature: Jurassic for a more aggressive game, Nature: Flight for people who prefer to avoid conflict, or Nature: Arctic Tundra for a challenging survival game on the edge of the habitable world.  There are 5 modules and 2 mini-modules that can be combined to create 96 different ecosystems. After the 2026 releases of the Climate module and 2 new mini-modules, there will be over 700 combinations to explore!


Nature Digital: Learn to play with an interactive tutorial on the free-to-try Nature app (iOS, Android, and Steam).
https://www.naturedigitalgame.com/


A Living Game System:
NorthStar Studio will release the Climate module in 2026, followed by one to two new modules per year for the next decade.
Vote for future modules here:
https://boardgamegeek.com/blog/308/blogpost/166360/future-nature-modules-poll


Designer Diary
Dominic Crapuchettes discusses the inspiration behind Nature, which began during his time as a professional Magic player.

Between Two Castles Essential Edition is a competitive drafting, tile-placement game for 1-8 players designed by Ben Rosset and Matthew O’Malley. It plays in about 45-60 minutes.

The king demands a castle! You are a world-renowned master builder who has been asked by the king to help design his castles. Projects of such significance require the expertise of more than one person, so for each assignment you are paired with another master builder to execute your grandiose plans. Will your planning and partnership skills be enough to design the most impressive castles in the world?

Between Two Castles is a competitive tile-drafting game in which each tile is a room in a castle. You work together with the player on your left to design one castle, and with the player on your right on another castle. On each turn you select two tiles from your hand, reveal them, then work with your partners to place them.

At the end of the game, each castle is scored. Your personal final score is the lower of the scores of the two castles you helped design, and the player with the highest final score wins the game. To win, you have to share your attention between two castles.

description:
Native Spirit is a thrilling area control game set in a time when Native American tribes thrived in harmony with nature, long before Europeans set foot on the continent. As the leader of your tribe, you must balance power, spirituality, and survival in this vast, unspoiled land. Claim sacred sites, hunt buffalo, and call upon the wisdom of powerful spirit animals, all while outmaneuvering rival tribes. Will you forge alliances and pursue peace, or wield the tomahawk to dominate the Great Plains?

Native Spirit combines deep strategy, immersive storytelling, and dynamic player interactions, bringing the untamed beauty and spiritual essence of the Great Plains to life.

Gameplay Overview:

Tribal Leadership: Each player leads a unique tribe with special abilities inspired by historical and spiritual traditions. You’ll need to strategically allocate your hunters, warriors, and shamans to claim territories, gather resources, and maintain harmony with nature.
Sacred Lands: Controlling regions such as sacred mountains and burial grounds grants spiritual bonuses like feathers and wisdom, giving you an edge over your rivals.
Hunting Buffalo: The buffalo herds are your lifeline, providing food and resources. But overhunting risks depleting this critical resource, and drawing shame on your people.
Dynamic Seasons: The game progresses through seasonal phases, each with unique challenges. In winter, players may face harsh blizzards or the aggression of rival tribes, while summer offers bountiful hunting opportunities.
Conflict or Cooperation: Choose to resolve disputes with peace pipes, negotiate with other players, or take up the tomahawk to dominate contested regions.
Spirit Quests: Fulfill secret personal goals to earn wisdom and victory points, adding layers of strategy and unpredictability.

The player with the most victory points after a set number of rounds wins the game.

—description from the publisher

Rolling Fates: Origin is the beginning of the Rolling Fates franchise.
Designed to be played cooperatively by 1-4 players, a free companion App will act as a storyteller, guiding players through mythical worlds.
Players will need to plan together their actions in order to defeat enemies, make the correct (often difficult) choices, find powerful relics and reach the end of the adventure!

Through a lot of dice rolling and cooperation, players will defeat dangerous foes, find treasures, and reach the end of many adventures. They may, perhaps often, be defeated and fail to do so...

—description from the publisher

Ninja Ki is a tense strategy board game of stealth, cunning, and daring. Players lead rival ninja clans, competing to infiltrate guarded zones, complete missions, and uncover each other’s hidden camps—all while protecting their own. Manage guards, deploy powerful Ronin, and outmaneuver your foes to gain Honor and Renown, becoming the ultimate master of the shadows.

Each round, an Event Card changes conditions, you select missions in secret, place guards publicly, then reveal where your ninjas strike.

Successfully completing missions grants you Honor and Renown—but beware: your enemies may search for your hideout, or send powerful Ronin to stop you in your tracks.

—description from the publisher

Kaleid-O! is a game for two to six players where players are competing with each other to make shapes of their color in a kaleidoscope!  Players take turns placing a gem of their color on the intersections of the lines on the board to make one or more of the shapes on the scoresheet using only their own color gems.  The more complex the shapes, the higher their point value!

Players must state what shapes they have made when they place their gem before they may mark them on their scoresheet.  If a player fails to identify one or more shapes that they have made, then when they pass the turn other players may shout out "Kaleid-O!," identify the shapes they overlooked and claim the points for themselves!  When all of the players have played their last gem, the player with the highest score wins.  Plan your moves carefully, because just having the most shapes does not guarantee you will have the most points!

—description from the designer

This promo pack features eight new cards and a double-sided reference card for the new icons introduced on these cards.

Play number cards and if it reaches 5 seconds, it explodes!

If you cut the cord with the scissors card, it won't explode! But if you cut the second cord, it will explode instantly!

When you shout "Ami Dungeon!", you place cards where you want to place them at the same time. If there is a conflict at this time, you will not be able to place your card where you want, so it is important to read your opponent's mind.

You can place cards of your own attribute wherever you want, but you can't place cards of other people's attributes unless they are in a place that is designated for cards of that attribute. Even if you don't get magic fragments, there are actions that allow you to increase the number of cards of your own attribute, so you can limit your opponent's actions and create opportunities.

description:
業アウト ("Gou Out") is a card game that combines elements of karma management with the traditional "Daifugo" (Grand Millionaire) mechanics. Players must strategically balance Good Deed and Evil Deed cards to manage their hand effectively. Choosing when to play certain cards is crucial, as players can intentionally weaken their positions to accumulate karma points.

The gameplay involves drawing from a shared deck, where players decide how to handle their hand by adopting new strategies through rules like "binding" cards. Special plays become available as the game progresses, adding layers of strategic depth.

The objective is to be the first to deplete your hand of cards while managing karma levels wisely. Winning means escaping the cycle of collecting Evil Deeds by tactically emptying one's hand, with the ultimate victory condition being the first player to free themselves of negative karma entirely.

Use cards to compete for gyoza! You have to decide how many you want to eat depending on your appetite! Be careful of raw and burnt gyoza!
Must follow, burst, trick taking

The Memory trilogy follows "Lots of Jewels!" and "Animal Jump."

You are an adventurer! Can you survive the cave where monsters await?

Collect monsters of the same type and defeat them!

Suitable for ages 5 and up, and fun for adults too!

Can be played by two people or more, and even cooperative play! (There is also a battle mode.)

Based on karuta, the rules are simple! (But still difficult)

Challenge your logic and work together to solve the puzzles.
Use the colors and shapes as clues to find the answer.
Let's measure today's thinking ability like a thermometer.
