But this is not your typical set collection game that requires a high-player count. Designed with solo play, Set in Space delivers an experience that is both tense and exciting.

—description from the designer

The Big Pond Expansion for Kohaku introduces new fish and decorative features for your koi pond that can be used alongside those in the base game.

Additionally this expansion contains an entirely new way to play Kohaku. Rather than each player building their own pond, you will place your tiles into a shared tile tableau. Featuring a new drafting system and additional ways to score, there's tons of fresh strategy to explore.

—description from the publisher

The Deluxe version of Six Sojourns contains all the boards and expansions in one box! It includes the Volcano Expansion, Economy Expansion, Foil Title, Metal Coins, and Storage Tuck Boxes.

Six Sojourns is a reimagining of Ryan Laukat's third published design, Eight-Minute Empire. It's a short area control game full of tough choices, creative strategy and tactics, and high player interaction.

Your goal in Six Sojourns is to grow your family and broaden their influence. Players take turns selecting a card from five on display. Each card has actions that let players build houses, gain ships, move, and gain new family members.

The cards also have special abilities and sets of icons that represent your family's expertise in various trades: cooking, carpentry, sewing, shoe-making, art, blacksmithing, and jewelry. Each game, you only select nine cards, and you'll be faced with meaty choices each turn as you focus on trades, abilities, or the map.

Six Sojourns has a larger board and more cards than Eight-Minute Empire, in addition to many exciting new features.


     People can be moved in groups, instead of one at a time, allowing for more dynamic play. 



     You can now build ships to travel the seas, moving between regions. Players can also pay you to use your ships for travel over the water. 



     Sea spaces give majority and goods.



     Houses, which replace cities, are worth two control, and only one house can be built in each space.


Choose Your Sojourn
Each sojourn adds new cards and rules to the game. You can customize your experience or play through each sojourn in order!

—description from the designer
A game of multiple answer questions, where each play tries to respond with an answer that starts with one of the letter cards they have been dealt!

Nine Knives Card Game is an elimination-style party game, that plunges players into the role of peculiar suspects who are all competing against one another to be the last person standing. Through strategic card play, players navigate a minefield of deduction and risk by using special action cards and drafting play now cards that can either boost or diminish your chances for survival to win. It's a battle of wits and luck, where only the most cunning (and perhaps the luckiest) will survive.

The story of Knives is intentionally vague, creating a sense of playful paranoia in a room full of suspects. The objective isn't to solve a specific crime per se, but rather to be the last one holding onto any evidentiary weapons cards to strengthen your chances for survival. Players are thrown into a situation where they must deduce who is holding the most deadly cards, and avoid being the one who is eliminated. The 'story' unfolds through the players' actions and deductions, creating emergent narratives each round.

Players start the game with 2 cards, and choose whether to play a card from their hand OR draw a card from the deck each turn. The objective of the game is to be the only remaining player in the game. Players remain in the game by having cards in their hand. Players are eliminated from the game once they have 0 cards in their hand. To win the game you must be the only person with cards in your hand at the end of the game.

—description from the designer

STUMBLE in to the world of Tommygun, where the Roarin' Twenties never ended- a world ruled by corruption, supernatural anomalies, diesel-powered marvels, madness, and jazz.

CREATE and paint a Gang of criminals, machines, and horrors, perhaps hailing from one of nine Factions.

PLAY through desperate and gamble-filled Scenarios, carving out an ill-gotten legacy amongst the pandemonium of a new America.

The Tommygun Rulebook includes everything you need to know to play a game of Tommygun V 1.0- a miniature-agnostic skirmish game of gang warfare. It includes updated rules, a total of 6 scenarios, the rules for playing as nine different Factions, idea-generation tables, and more!

This file includes a version with and without backgrounds for the purposes of printing.

boardgame: Fisticuffs: The Game of Victorian Era Violence
description:
Beat your rivals to the finish by beating them senseless in Fisticuffs: the Game of Victorian Era Violence!

Choose from 5 characters, each with their own unique Victorian Era neighborhoods.

Collect a wide variety of attack cards and use them against your rivals. Fists, knives, canes, even top hats, bees and poisoned tea- nothing is off the table when it comes to dispatching your opponents! But be careful - your rivals are just as dastardly as you are.

Place booby traps to trip up your foes - but be careful not to trip them yourself!

Don't land on the same space as a rival, or it's fisticuffs!

Happenstance Events can help or hinder your progress!

—description from the designer

Wishlist – Version 2
A powerful blend of fun and financial wisdom, wrapped in a vibrant, strategic board game.
Wishlist – Version 2 is a 2–6 player educational board game where players must navigate the joys and challenges of managing money. Balancing short-term happiness and long-term dreams is no easy task—but in Wishlist, it’s an adventure.
Featuring double-sided player boards (Beginner & Pro modes), realistic financial decisions like fixed deposits and life events, and a colorful world of spending, saving, and dreaming, Wishlist transforms complex financial concepts into accessible, interactive fun. Each round challenges players to make meaningful choices with real-world parallels—and every mistake is a chance to learn.
Co-developed by Wizards of Learning and Sea (Thailand), Wishlist draws insight from student and teacher focus groups (via Inskru), expert financial guidance from Money Coach, and real-world playtesting in partnership with IBGL. This isn’t just a game—it’s a tool for empowerment, designed to spark conversations about money, values, and life goals.
Whether you’re a family seeking a meaningful game night, an educator teaching financial literacy, or a gamer who loves thoughtful mechanics with real-life impact—Wishlist invites you to dream big, budget smart, and play with purpose.

Djunquick is a strategy-based card game set in a world born from the Big Bang, where small but resilient creatures called "DJUNs" struggle for survival. Facing harsh environmental conditions, deadly viruses, and rival species, they must form flocks and navigate through natural selection to secure their place in this unforgiving world.

Players take turns playing cards from their hands onto the central play area. The goal of each round is to play a card with a higher value than the previous one or use special abilities to gain an advantage. The game consists of two main phases: the Gathering Phase, where players attempt to collect the strongest cards for their "nests", and the Leader Phase, where they use influence cards and strategic moves to dominate the round.

Players aim to form flocks by collecting sets of four matching-value cards in their nests and transferring them to their "home". Throughout the game, they must also manage viruses, which can negatively impact their progress. The game continues until the DJUNs deck is depleted, and the winner is the player with the most completed flocks.

Players use their Kindred Spirits to obtain magical energies on the ether plains.

The ether plains is the area where magical energy gathers, collects & can be harvested from.  The ether plains vary from game to game, which creates replay-ability.

Gain magical energies for each run ascending or descending between 1 & 6.

Magical energy can also be obtained from matching numerical of a kinds on the ether plains.

Once no further routes exist in the ether plains, players will be able to conclude their final harvest of magical energy.

The player with the most magical energy will be crowned the winner.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Mage Noir: The Crow and the Scholar
description:
Duel alongside Animals in Mage Noir! Choose your unique companion and unleash its full potential. Follow the swift and agile Crow, or soar with the majestic Eagle striking like lightning! With these new Air spells, command the storm and unleash your strategies in a flash.
Let the wind carry you to victory!

From Mage Noir Season 3, Animal Aenigma.

The players must fly from the starting point to the destination airport. Each player chooses their own route. They have several options and must try to find the most convenient route. The first player to arrive at the destination is the winner. Players can also agree not to land at the destination airport, but to simply fly there and then return to the starting airport.

The game is played with one die. Each player may roll the dice three times in a row. After each roll, a player must draw, or the dice are forfeited. Therefore, adding up the dice from the three rolls and then drawing is not permitted. At the start of the game, each player must first roll a 6 before landing their glider on the airfield. As soon as it is their turn to roll again, they can take off. The gliders can fly in any direction. They move from square to square according to the number of dice rolled.

The gliders must fly from updraft area to updraft area. Each player must always cover the distance from one updraft area to another with three throws. If more points are scored on the third or sometimes even the second throw than necessary to reach the desired updraft area, the extra points generally remain unused. Anyone flying into a downwind zone will have 2 points deducted from their roll. If a player fails to reach a thermal area with three throws and their glider is then between the thermal areas, it is considered to have sunk. The glider must then be returned to the starting airfield and begin its flight again.

The game was published between 1933 und 1942.

—user summary

Wastewater Treatment Plant is an amazing board game for education. Entertaining game that teaches the process of wastewater treatment. Learning about quality control and obtaining a permit to start the plant.
Grab 6 coins to start the game. Roll the dice and purchase the material. Purchase the material irrespective to complete the treatment stage. Pay for permit and quality checks. Complete the treatment stages after purchasing required material. Finish all the stages first to win the game.

—description from the designer

Up to 6 people can participate in the game, and the order of play is determined by drawing cards. Two dice are rolled. Each player must roll their own starting and ending number. They can only move over the marks marked on the bowling alley (explained in more detail below) if they roll their own number. Otherwise, they also advance if another player rolls the corresponding number.

The first player to finish the game wins the first prize.

x advances one space.

← goes back two spaces.

/ is skipped once when rolling the dice.

—user summary

The stakes have never been higher in the Lisciani Avengers board game! Thanos threatens the universe, and only the Avengers can stop him. In this fast-paced game, players must team up to defeat the mighty titan before he makes the fatal snap. Exciting missions, epic battles, and iconic characters from the Marvel universe await you!

Assemble the most powerful Avengers team and stand against the might of Thanos! An exciting, strategic game where teamwork is key. Save the universe from a single snap!

Amazing adventures await you in the Spider-Man universe! ️
Join Spider-Man and your friends in this super exciting board game! Develop strategy and speed while defeating evil forces with the help of the Spider-Web.
During the game, children develop logical thinking, strategy and manual dexterity.

boardgame: Bing and Friends: The Adventure Homeward Journey
description:
Bing and Friends: The Adventure Homeward Journey is an exciting yet simple board game for the little ones, where they can embark on an adventurous journey with their favorite fairy tale heroes. In the game, Bing the bunny invites his friends to a picnic in the park on a sunny day. After hours of fun together, the gang finds that it is getting late, so it is time to return home to sleep after dinner and a bath. They all set off on a journey, but who will get home first?

The spinner shows who can move to which colored space and how many. The winner of the game is the one who gets home with his pawn first.

Cocomelon board game - Can be played based on the classic Goose game. As soon as the children have finished kindergarten, they can travel on the school bus, then there is a snack, then brushing their teeth with their brothers and finally the evening story at bedtime.
The board field begins with waking up and ends with sleep after school or meals.
The board also has special fields that make the game more attractive.
The product is designed for the youngest children and develops the ability to communicate with others.

boardgame: Mage Noir: The Fox and the Avenger
description: Duel alongside Animals in Mage Noir! Choose your unique companion and unleash its full potential. Cunning and untamed, the Fox will throw your opponent off balance. Or perhaps you'll choose the Lion, King of Beasts and symbol of the Sun on the battlefield. With these new Fire spells, fury will feed your power... so let your anger burn!

boardgame: Mage Noir: The Dolphin and the Sailor
description:
Duel alongside Animals in Mage Noir! Choose your unique companion and unleash its full potential.
Will you choose the Dolphin, dancing among the waves and guiding your path with graceful fluidity? Or the Ermine, naturally adaptable, offering you subtle tactics your opponents would be unwise to underestimate?
With these new Water spells, harness the tides and command the seas. An ocean of possibilities awaits!

boardgame: Mage Noir: The Deer and the Huntress
description:
Duel alongside Animals in Mage Noir! Choose your unique companion and unleash its full potential.
Will you be led by the Deer, guardian of the forests and symbol of renewal, ready to defend nature? Or will you join the Queen Bee and her tireless workers?
With these new Vegetal spells, expand your forest and hunt down your opponents. They won’t escape your verdant clutches.

boardgame: Mage Noir: The Dog and The Warrior
description:
Duel alongside Animals in Mage Noir! Choose your unique companion and unleash its full potential.
Will you stand by the Dog, a loyal ally capable of mastering countless techniques, or follow the way of the Scarab, harnessing ancient and mystical powers?
With these new Mineral spells, fight with the strength and pride of a Gladiator. Force your opponents to taste the dust of the arena!

boardgame: Mage Noir: The Cat and the Astronomer
description:
Duel alongside Animals in Mage Noir! Choose your unique companion and unleash its full potential.
Will you be guided by the elusive Cat, slipping indifferently between past, present, and future? Or will you instead choose the Tardigrade, infinitely small yet master of the vast?
With these new Arcane spells, dare to harness forces beyond your own and make your opponents confront the immensity of the stars.

boardgame: Forest Shuffle: Chinese Hare / Red Panda Promo Card
description:
Chinese Hare / Red Panda
P005 - Chinese Promo Card

Chinese Hare
Any numbers of Chinese Hares may share this spot
Scores: 1 Point per Hare

Red Panda
Shuffle the discard pile and put 10 cards on top of the draw pile.
Scores: 2 Points

The ducklings are having a race today. The crazy parade will take them all the way around the pond. But watch out: Papa Duck is sitting in the middle. He must have eaten a bit too much and is farting like crazy! Don't let his farts hit you, or you'll have to start all over again. Who can get three ducklings to the finish line first? Who will win the funny race? And who's a lame duck?

—description from the publisher

You roll a dice and move one of your three little duck figures that many spaces further. Finally, you rotate in clockwise order the big duck in the middle until it clicks as many times as the dice indicate. Now you press the plastic duck firmly and let it expel air (fart) so that all the little duck figures on its backside fly away.

There are stone fields for the little ducks that are safe and from which figures cannot be farted away.

Whoever gets all three of their figures to the water space first wins the game.

boardgame: 戰史桌遊: 八二三戰役 (War History Board Game: The 823 Battle)
description:
In order to commend the compatriots who sacrificed their lives for the country in the August 23rd Battle and to strengthen the national defense awareness, the Ministry of National Defense specially produced a historically significant war history board game. Through the game, we can understand the war history and commemorate the martyrs. We hope that the Taiwanese people can learn from history, be prepared for danger in times of peace, remember the lessons of war, cherish peace, and then support the national army to ensure national security and the well-being of the people.

為表彰八二三戰役為國犧牲奉獻的軍民同胞及強化全民國防意識，國防部特別製作富有歷史意義的戰史桌遊，藉由遊戲瞭解戰史，緬懷先烈先賢，期盼國人能以史為鑑、居安思危，記取戰爭的教訓，珍惜和平，進而支持國軍，保障國家安全與百姓福祉。
publishers: 國防部政務辦公室史政編譯處 (Department of History and Politics Compilation, Political Affairs Office of the Ministry of National Defense)

boardgame: Endeavor: Deep Sea – Deluxe Upgrade Pack
description:
Deluxe Upgrade Pack contains the following enhancements to the components and gameplay:

     Recessed player mats
     Shaped and screen-printed meeples
     Gametrayz insert
     5th player components
     Robotic Wanderer mini expansion
     Orca reintroduction mini expansion
     Underwave Academy mini expansion


Note: These items are already included in the Endeavor: Deep Sea Deluxe Edition.

nella edizione italiana dell'upgrade pack non sono state inserite le mini espansioni ma sono vendute separatamente
language_dependency: 2: Some necessary text - easily memorized or small crib sheet

description:
Summer is finally here!

Refresh yourself in the cool water whether it's a lake, fountain or river!

The Summer is part of the 4 seasons tile series with individual illustrations. You can use the tiles to expand the field or as a mini-expansion.

boardgame: Speedcicleta: Robots and Road Hazards Mini Expansion
description:
Robots and Road Hazards is a mini-expansion for our racing game, Speedcicleta. It introduces Robots, automa that can be used either solo or with a group. We've also included an extra cyclist, for a total of 6 cyclists, expanding the core game's player range from 2-5 to a range of 1-6. It also introduces Road Hazards, effects that modify an entire tile.

—description from the designer

Get Stacked is a strategic party game where players duke it out in a series of fast-paced mini-games to win powerful, stackable treasure and bragging rights. Then, use your hard-earned loot to power up your player to take down monsters and earn victory points.  Transparent treasure cards lay directly on your champion to make over 16,000,000+ unique combinations of armor, pets, and more. Utilize specific combos and power levels to defeat monsters and show your competition who's boss.

In each game you will play a set number of rounds based on the number of players. When the game ends, the player with the most victory points from defeated monsters claims ultimate triumph!

—description from the publisher

In Biggest Catch, players compete to reel in the best fish using their fishing rod cards. But in this game, quantity isn't everything—you also want to land the biggest fish to impress your fellow anglers!

How to Play:

Each round, players play fishing rod cards to try and win the trick.

The winner of the trick collects all the fish in play.

At the end of the game, each player takes a final photo with their biggest fish. But here's the twist: are your arms long enough to make it look even bigger?

Biggest Catch is a chaotic and interactive trick-taking game where you can mess with your opponents and steal their glory. Strategy, timing, and a bit of bluffing will determine who lands the most impressive catch!

Are you ready to become the ultimate angler?

—description from the designer

boardgame: The Red Dragon Inn: Allies – Jin vs Greppa
description:
It’s the battle of the bards at the Red Dragon Inn! Two new bards storm into the tavern—one who encourages patrons to get up on stage and sing, the other who’ll get on stage herself to dish out insults.

The friendly and popular Jin joins the hardcore snark-master Greppa in this new two-character expansion!

—description from the publisher

When you draw the Dolphin tile, follow these steps in order:

     Starting with you, each player flips a tile of their choice from their board and applies the effects of the character thus revealed.
     Return the Dolphin to the box.
     Draw and play a new tile.

boardgame: The Adventures of Tintin: The Trick-Taking Game
description:
In The Adventures of Tintin: The Trick-Taking Game, players must uncover the hidden plot cards of their opponents by searching for clues in locations scattered across the world. Each location card has a different rule for winning tricks, so the player who wins the trick in a given round can ask a question about the plot card belonging to the owner of the location card — provided they meet the requirements of the character cards played that round.

As the game progresses, players eliminate false leads in their notebooks until someone reaches a conclusion and correctly deduces another player's plot card, earning points toward the final score.

—description from the designer

Panic Taking is a trick-taking game where players compete to collect cards based on ever-changing scoring rules, aiming to earn the highest points.

However, the ways to score shift every round and every game. On top of that, stay alert-secondary or tertiary rules may suddenly be revealed!

Victory goes to the player with the highest total points after 4 rounds.

Now, who decides these rules? Does the game auto-generate them? No. It's entirely up to the players.

VOIDN135 is a trick-taking game with must-follow trump cards where players rescue humans from monsters. However, if monsters remain in your hand at the end of the round, they attack you-so you'd better play them quickly!

In Onmyōfu Gō, players compete as rival onmyõji (yin-yang sorcerers) in a high-stakes ritual to determine the greatest mystic master. Using a hybrid deck of talisman cards and spirit cards, this game blends the classic climbing/ shedding mechanics of Daifugō () with unique yin-yang powers that shift the tide of battle. The first player to claim two victories ascends as the Supreme Onmyõji!

English manual here
https://drive.google.com/file/d/1DaQgE0n2IvhHdlorIO_WFlDdDb6M1eF6/view?usp=drive_link

Available to purchase at BOOTH
https://booth.pm/ja/items/6297357
publishers: 静岡テーブルゲーム工房 (Shizuoka Table Game Studio）

boardgame: 大クトゥルフ発狂大富豪 (Cthulhu Mythos Madness Daifugō)
description: Cthulhu Mythos Madness Daifugō is a high-chaos climbing game that grafts 25+ global house rules onto a Lovecraftian nightmare. Players battle with a hybrid deck (standard cards + 25 insanity-inducing originals) as new rules actively corrupt gameplay. One round you're collecting tricks-the next, you're sacrificing cards to Cthulhu or losing points for saying the word "fish."

boardgame: スートアタックモンスター (Suit Attack Monster)
description:
Suit Attack Monster is a trick-taking game where players pretend to work together to slay a dragon!. However, unlike most trick-taking games, the damage is calculated by adding up the numbers of cards that all players have played to attack a monster!

If your attack power (damage) exceeds the monster's HP, you defeat the monster and get a reward (coins).

The player with the highest card number will get the most rewards. Players in second and third place will also receive “extra coins”, so do your best to defeat the monsters! Cooperation! (Really?)

Monster Mixology is a push-your-luck, print at home game for 1-6 players with APP companion and variable playing sheets.

It combines traditional tabletop gaming with digital convenience through a companion web app. Players aim to collect peculiar ingredients to craft exotic cocktails, all while navigating the unpredictable challenges that arise, testing their risk-taking abilities. ​

The game's companion web app enhances gameplay by managing over 100 ingredient and recipe cards, eliminating the need for physical card components. Additionally, the app can generate over 2 million unique monster combinations, ensuring a fresh experience each session. Players have the option to let the app create random monster lineups or customize their own, tailoring the game to their preferences. ​

Railheads: Denmark is a cube rails game about the development of the Danish rail network and how it brought the nation's archipelagic regions together while also enabling the promotion of regional industrial development.

Through the use of a highly interactive and cascading action selection mechanism the players compete by laying tracks, constructing bridges, developing industries, and making investments while trying to avoid getting too burdened by Danish wealth taxation with one ultimate goal in mind, to be the richest magnate when the game ends.

Railheads: Denmark is the first installment in a series of cube rails games that all share a prime action selection mechanism as well as a central theme of both railroad network and industry refinement getting developed in tandem.

—description from the designer

Tosk a.k.a. the Tournament of Sacred Kings (formerly known as Tilted Hilts) is a strategy playing card game of “hand”-to-“hand” combat between two champions. Players spend stamina (STA) to play action and ally cards, while conserving enough to replenish their hand afterward. The first player to reduce their opponent’s hit points (HP) to zero by overpowering their defenses wins the battle!

Tosk uses a standard playing card deck that has center pips on the A–10, plus both Jokers. Give each player a Joker to represent their champion. Both players start with 20 hit points. Each round has three phases — Strategy, Combat, and Recover. Both players complete each phase at the same time and must wait for each other before proceeding. Play continues over a series of rounds until a player’s hit points reach zero.

Dungeon Dilemma is a chaotic co-op dungeon crawler for 2–6 players, where a team of ill-prepared, overly confident misfit heroes dives into an ever-changing dungeon full of traps, monsters, loot — and utter mayhem. Their goal? Defeat the dreaded demon lord Zarlosh… or at least survive long enough to regret their life choices.

At the heart of the game lies the WÜRFELINATOR – a cursed group die that determines your fate after every battle. Will you gain bonus loot, suffer unexpected damage, or trigger a random shopping spree? The result affects everyone — and no one is safe. Each dungeon level is built from modular layout cards, hiding dangerous encounters, treasures, and vital clues about the final boss.

Combat is resolved using dice, attack stats, and unique hero abilities. Players must work together to survive increasingly powerful enemies, but chaos is never far: exploding potions, cursed loot, and talking treasure chests are just part of the experience. Between dungeon levels, you'll trade with the shady merchant Grollbart, spend gold, and gamble on new die faces to power up the WÜRFELINATOR — for better or worse.

The ultimate objective? Defeat Zarlosh and escape the dungeon in one piece — or at least with more loot than your teammates. Glory, riches, and disaster await. Probably in that order.

—description from the designer

Bringing Home the Bacon is a childrens game where players collect slices of  bacon while moving around a board using  colored playing pieces with a small pole and die.

The slices of bacon are represented as wooden or plastic discs with a central hole. Groups of 3 or 4 are strategically placed on colored circles around the board. Players land directly on the colored circle and collect a slice of bacon to place on their pole. If the player can land on a colored circle the same as his playing piece the player collects all the slices of bacon. Directly landing on an opposition player results in capturing all their slices of bacon.

The game ends when all the bacon is taken and the player with the most slices is the winner.

—user summary

boardgame: Harry Potter: Hogwarts Journey Board Game
description:
You finally got your Hogwarts letter! Join Harry, Hermione, Ron, and Luna as they journey through the halls of Hogwarts. School is in session and you want to be the reason that your House wins the House Cup at the end of the year. Gather your friends, grab your Marauders Map to help you find your way as you all journey through the Hallowed Halls. Dodging Mythical Creatures and battling at the Dueling Club, who will be the first to make it to the finish and become this year’s Dueling Club champion?

Enjoy this entertaining magical game brimming with Harry, Ron, Hermione, and all the friends then make along their Hogwarts journey. Now, you can experience the magic all year long!

—description from the publisher

Contents:
• 1 Game board
• 4 Character Pieces
• 8-Sided Die
• 42 Harry Potter Cards

When playing with the Hand of Fate expansion, a new way of filling inn expansion tiles on the Investment track should be introduced. In this variant, we recommend playing on side B of the Investment board, but with a new tile replenishment mechanic.

OOF-DAH! LITE is a beginner's version of OOF-DAH! COMPLETE, the Organic Farm Strategy Game.  In it, Growers learn the ropes of growing organic vegetables on a farm by disking, seeding, cultivating, and harvesting crops.  The Grower who harvests the most vegetables wins!  Game-play is driven by dice rolls over rounds.  On each roll, Growers may choose to advance their farms, or go on the attack and hamper the efforts of opponents.
family: Versions & Editions: Junior Versions of Grown-Up Games

description:
The Mission Bitcoin board game is a fun and engaging activity that teaches the basics of bitcoin in a kid-friendly way. Players take on the role of space explorers working to collect 21 "bitcoin" game tokens by rolling dice and navigating their rocket pawn around the game board. With simple rules and gameplay that encourages strategy, the whole family can enjoy competing to be the first to complete their mission. This educational yet lighthearted board game makes for a great bitcoin meet-up, game night with friends, or family activity.

With its out-of-this-world theme, Mission Bitcoin is sure to spark interest in bitcoin while providing entertainment for kids ages 6 and up as well as adults of any age.

—description from the publisher

Game About Countries is an educational card game that helps players learn about 194 countries worldwide. Each card contains key information such as population, land area, highest point, capital, flag, and geographic location. Designed for both children and adults, it offers an engaging way to learn geography while having fun.

Players take turns either comparing country facts or answering geography-based challenges. In the fact-based mode, a player selects a category (e.g., population), and all players reveal their cards, with the highest value winning the round. In challenge mode, players must answer questions about a chosen country's flag, continent, capital, or location. The game is accessible for all ages, as difficulty levels can be adjusted based on the players' knowledge.

The goal is to collect the most cards by successfully winning rounds. The game ends when a player collects all the cards (for two players) or when one player runs out of cards (for three or more), with the winner being the one holding the most cards.

boardgame: Unclaimed: The Mystery of the Royal Hotel
description:
An unsolved mystery shrouds the luxurious Royal Hotel. Will you be the one to uncover the secret in this fast-paced, quick-thinking adventure game?

On her deathbed, the hotel's enigmatic owner, Lady Danton, revealed that shed created a trail of cryptic puzzles around the hotel. At the trail's end, she had placed a truly unique prize. Any hotel guest would be eligible to try to claim it for themselves - but if not solved within ten years the prize would be lost forever.

Now, just hours remain. Long-tempted to test your puzzle-solving abilities within those famous walls, you've seized this final chance.

You're standing in the stunning hotel foyer, and there's no time to lose. The beautiful building is teeming with expert treasure hunters, all with one goal in mind ...

Gather some friends and get ready to play! During the game, you'll move through the hotel solving a series of interactive puzzles. Your ultimate quest? To solve the mystery and claim Lady Danton's prize for yourself!

—description from the publisher

Who Can Create The Most Outrageous Creatures?!
Get ready to use your imagination skills and get creative like never before! Nonsensical Creatures is just the right amount of strategy, creativity, and ridiculousness!

In Nonsensical Creatures, you create crazy creatures and try to get other players to guess which creature it is you’ve created. The other players have also created a creature that they are trying to get you to guess. Better clues will pay off more in the end, but only if someone can understand them. How many clues will you give, and how well will you guess other creatures?

—description from the publisher
family: Components: Dry Erase Markers / Dry Erase Surfaces
Mechanism: Give a Clue / Get a Clue

description:
POO doo GOO is a fast-finger grabbing dice game. A roll of the dice will unleash players' lightning-fast reflexes and razor-sharp minds!

FAST REFLEXES: This game requires speed and rapid decision-making. Once the dice are rolled, every participant rapidly examines the dice and uses two spread fingers to promptly grab any one die from the tabletop.

STRATEGY: Each die contains the words POO, poo, DOO, doo, GOO, and goo. Each 2 chips if you grab a DOO or doo, Lose a chip if you grab a POO or poo, Earn no chip for a GOO or goo.

How to play:

     Roll the dice and quickly grab what you need. The first player to earn exactly 11 chips wins! If a player goes over 11, they lose 3 chips but continue playing.
     POO = Lose a chip.
     DOO = Earn 2 chips.
     GOO = No chip for you! 


—description from the publisher

On The Button is a fast playing simulation of curling. It recaptures the drama and excitement of curling, mostly in a single dice roll for each END. There are two versions of the game, one is express, the other is a bit more detailed and more of a narrative, but both play very fast and are interchangeable.

Using dice and charts, each turn simulates the final "Hammer" shot in each of the ten ends. Team players will have different qualities that will be tested to see how successful the throw has been.

The game comes complete with a Creation Guide that allows you to create your own curlers and teams. It also includes two sets of fictional teams - international men and international women.

Tired of the same old card games? Meet Fudged—the ultimate mix of strategy, sabotage, and laughs! Whether you’re playing with friends, family, or total strangers, every round is unpredictable, exciting, and packed with twists! Easy to learn, fast-paced, and designed for game nights, parties, and competitive fun. Get yours today and see who gets FUDGED first! (Disclaimer: May ruin game night and cause minor grudges. Play at your own risk.)

In Fudged, every player starts with four hidden cards. On your turn, draw a card, swap it, trash it, or play an action to mess with your opponents. The goal? End with the lowest score—but watch out! Special action cards like ‘Fudge You’ and ‘Nuclear’ can turn the game upside down in seconds!

Experience 5 thrilling rounds with exciting twists—Warm-up, Hush it!, Blackout, Double it, and Nuclear. Each round brings new challenges to keep the game unpredictable!

Outsmart your opponents with powerful action cards like 'Fudge You,' 'Reverse It,' and 'Nuclear.' These cards add layers of strategy and fun to every game.

How to play:
The objective is to have the lowest sum of card values on your table at the end of each round and ultimately the lowest total score after 5 rounds (write the scores on a paper or something).

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Cosmic Chains: A Collection Of Postcards
description:
These blueprints were never brought to life... or were they? The expansion includes two Sketchy Dude cards mixed into your starting decks and can be used to revive already destroyed satellites.
Also, six postcards with Cosmic Chains comic strips will tell you more about the lives of cats and robots in the Earth's orbit.

Try not to get dizzy during this drawing guessing game! Take turns wearing the spinning glasses and draw your way to victory. If your team guesses the clue before time runs out, you earn a lens token from the board. The team with the most lens tokens after all have been removed from the board wins the game!

—description from the publisher
family: Mechanism: Give a Clue / Get a Clue

description:
Teburu Dungeon: Sword and Sorcery is an adaptation of the fantasy Sword & Sorcery game for the Teburu System. This co-op dungeon crawler for features the return of the original cast of Immortal Souls characters in a brand new, specifically designed campaign.

Explore the world of Sword & Sorcery like never before. The Teburu System guides you through gameplay, narrates the story, and delivers surprising twists and unexpected events - all while managing the bookkeeping and rules seamlessly.

—description from the publisher

WW2 SALVO! EUROPEAN THEATER, 2nd ed. is a solitaire, tactical naval strategy wargame that enables players to recreate World War II naval battles between individual allied and axis warships on the table top.

The design uses the Salvo! game system, adapted to a WW2 setting. (Great War Salvo! 3rd ed. is its World War I counterpart.)

The second edition is a full-color 52-page rule booklet, containing all rules, game tables, advanced rules and options, 17 historical scenarios, and designer's notes.  Game components make up the pages of the PDF, with Scenario Cards, Reference Card, Sea Display, and significantly, this new edition now has twelve warship counter sheets (sections #1-12), including ships from Great Britain, Germany, France, Italy, Finland, and the Soviet Union... 216 ship counters in all, drawn to scale. Using historically rated warships (BB, BC, PB, CA, CL, AMC types), rated in a variety of offensive and defensive categories, players can assess at a glance the relative strengths and weaknesses of each ship.  NOTE: The first edition of this game was called Advanced Salvo! European Theater.  The Salvo! game system remains the same, but with new name and more components and scenarios in full-color format.

WW2 Salvo! European Theater, 2nd ed. is primarily a ship-vs-ship solitaire game, but rules are included for two-players as well, with one or multiple ships on a side.  All the major warships from each country are provided (see list below), allowing players to recreate any number of actual and hypothetical Second World War encounters.

The game may be played with the supplied counters, or your own ship miniatures.  The game is adaptable to miniatures play on the table top, with scales of one turn equaling several minutes of real time, and each range band representing approximately 5000 yards (2.5 nautical miles).

Originally published in 2015, WW2 Salvo! European Theater, 2nd ed. is now available.  If you enjoyed the first edition (called, Advanced Salvo! European Theater), you'll no doubt like this new edition and what it has to offer.  Designed by Gary Graber.  Published by Minden Games.

—description from the publisher

This 40 page PDF takes four of the 1942 Western Desert scenarios from our Monty’s Desert Battles book and adapts them for the popular 4’ x 6’ table size. 
With re-worked forces represented by easy to replicate graphic orbats, it allows players to recreate some of the key clashes between Rommels’ Panzer Army Afrika and 8th Army, under its new commander, Montgomery.


     Himeimat pits a light, but highly mobile British delaying force against the combined German and Italian recce forces.
     Alam el Halfa brings to life the divisional level attack by 21st Panzer Division against a staunch British infantry and armour defence.
     Lightfoot allows players to replicate the Highland Division’s El Alamein assault against formidable Axis defences in a manageable space.
     Bir el Abd plays out a subsequent ‘breakthrough’ encounter between the Italian Ariete Armoured Division and 7th Armoured Division’s Desert Rats.


With pictures of key model vehicles and units to inspire your army building, Monty v Rommel also provides Rapid Fire Reloaded vehicle and gun chart stats for all the AFVs, softskins and weapons featured in the games.

—description from the publisher
language_dependency: 3: Moderate in-game text - needs crib sheet or paste ups

description:
Veilward is the expansion to The Isofarian Guard. Experience the epic storytelling and strategic gameplay that made The Isofarian Guard unforgettable. A cast of new characters, new lands, and fresh mechanics are waiting to be discovered. Venture beyond Isofar's borders and explore the mystery of the Veil, all brought to life through immersive audio narration by Forteller.

Veilward utilizes bag building mechanics seen in the base game while introducing a new deck-building system alongside a unique grid-based card mechanic where you'll strategically shift cards in battle to trigger powerful effects.

In Veilward, you'll explore more of Telios as the Guards explore not only Isofar, but into the country of Falmund. Veilward also introduces a new way to play called 'Cinematic Mode'. This mode focuses on story progression while limiting grinding and streamlines character advancement.

-description from publisher

Inside the doors of your little shop lie wonders beyond wonders. Herein you have collected oddities from the four corners of the globe and beyond! Strange specimens, bizarre baubles, and curious collectibles, each one a true one-of-a-kind. Your customers demand items unlike any other, so stock your shelves carefully – keep only the rarest of the rare while sending duplicates, copies, and reproductions to the second-rate shops next door.

Over the course of three rounds, you’ll create your shop’s inventory by collecting unique oddities while sending unwanted cards to your rival shopkeepers. With each Oddity card you collect, you may play it to your own display for free, or spend coins to play it to an opponent’s display or banish it for all eternity.

At round’s end, each unique card in your display will earn you valuable points. Duplicated cards will earn no points but gain you 2 coins. The player who displays the most one-of-a-kind items and scores the most points at the end of three rounds wins the game.

—description from the publisher

boardgame: Marvel Dice Throne: Missions – Promo Card Set
description: Contains 6 Ally Cards.
language_dependency: 4: Extensive use of text - massive conversion needed to be playable

description:
Mr. Oswald is the founder of the Puzzle Society, an assortment of puzzle and game enthusiasts from a variety of professions that come together monthly for game sessions.

When it comes to organizing the monthly games, Mr. Oswald enjoys having a little fun with his assistants by turning the planning of the events into its own game.

As Mr. Oswald’s assistants you will be responsible for planning next month’s Puzzle Society game sessions, including who will attend, at what hour, and where they sit at the game table according to the puzzles Mr. Oswald has created. The assistant that organizes the game sessions to best solve Mr. Oswald’s puzzles wins the game.

—description from the publisher

Detectives Vincent Carro and Jane Phantom cast the new star for their undercover team. Dry theory is out of place here. They are looking for a real talent of improvisation!
Draw cards for location, object, topic and characteristic and get started. Your mission: Combine all the elements into an epic monologue. Impress the jury - your fellow casting talents - and collect points in each round. As showdown the two best performers duel in a final dialog.
The casting is open. Improvise, convince, win!

—description from the publisher (translated)

Die Detektive Vincent Carro und Jane Phantom casten den neuen Star für ihr Undercover-Team. Trockene Theorie ist hier fehl am Platz. Gesucht wird ein echtes Improvisationstalent!
Ziehe Karten für Ort, Gegenstand, Thema und Eigenschaft und leg los. Deine Mission: Kombiniere alle Elemente zu einem epischen Monolog. Beeindrucke die Jury – deine mitspielenden Casting-Talente – und sammle in jeder Runde Punkte. Als Showdown duellieren sich die zwei Besten in einem finalen Dialog.
Das Casting ist eröffnet. Improvisiere, überzeuge, gewinne!

—description from the publisher

This is a bonus expansion developed during a kickstarter campaign. This mini expansion includes two sprites: Fyxx and Bouque.

This expansion allows you to meet Sprites while you are adventuring. Each of the cards has beautiful Sprite artwork on the front, along with a fun descriptor. There are three different abilities listed on the back of each card. When you draw one of the Sprite cards, you will roll two dice to determine if you receive benefits.

Are You Ready to Step Into The Rich and Distinctive Cuisine of the Ottoman Empire with Master Chef Yunus Emre Akkor?

Ottoman Cuisine is a 2 to 4 player Euro-style board game that blends action selection, engine building, goal completion and area control mechanics with a world-famous gastronomy cuisine theme through a specially developed action system.

Game will take you to the famous Istiklal Street in 19th century Istanbul, capital city of Ottoman Empire. As the head chef of one of the newly recognized restaurants on Istiklal Street, you will learn recipes from all over Anatolia, cook them with ingredients you buy from the market and special ones you gather from the 7 regions of Anatolia, and serve them to customers you invite from the crowds of Istiklal Street to your restaurant, gradually increasing your fame and reputation in the major Ottoman Palaces of Istanbul.

With your earnings, you will increase your regular visiting customers by improving the service and quality of your kitchen and restaurant, and you will bring your restaurant to number one by hosting more prestigious customers. Be careful! During this process, do not forget to please the Food Judges who will come from Sultan’s Palace to inspect your restaurant from time to time.

Ottoman palace cuisine is one of the most diverse and refined cuisines, enriched by the food culture of many geographies where the Ottoman Empire spread, from the Seljuks to the 20th century and from there to the present day. Players will cook recipes from this era carefully selected by Master Chef Yunus Emre Akkor, who has proven his expertise in Ottoman and Anatolian cuisine with his twenty-five years of culinary experience and food research.

Some Key Features:
 
    Specially Developed Action System


Build your strategy by using the Basic and Wheel actions in the most efficient way with the help of your assistants and become the head chef of the Ottoman Cuisine!


    56 Carefully Selected Recipes


Discover unique food and dessert recipes from the Ottoman palace cuisine and the 7 regions of Anatolia.


    48 Different Customers with Artwork Reflecting The Period


Host from a diverse range of customer profiles that are hand drawn with attention to detail in your restaurant that will bring the 19th Century Istiklal Street crowd to your table.


    Variable Setup


Variable setup elements provide a different gameplay experience for each new game.


    Celebrate Fame in İstanbul’s Major Ottoman Palaces


Become the favorite of the food judges by researching and cooking the dishes you have learned from all around Anatolia and make a name for yourself in four different Ottoman palace kitchens in Istanbul!

Super Pixel Tactics is a fully remastered edition of the entire Pixel Tactics series, as well as 30+ new heroes and leaders! Each card has new art and is upgraded for legibility.

Pixel Tactics is a head-to-head game of tactical combat for two players. Each player has an identical deck of cards, from which they draft a leader. The leader's abilities vastly alter the strategy and playability of every other card in the deck, making the game playable in countless different ways.

In the game, players take turns placing cards and attacking. Each card can activate in various ways, taking on offensive capabilities in the front rows of the unit, or support powers in the back rows. Cards can also be played as orders, that is, powerful one-time effects that can turn the tide of battle.

Play continues until either player's leader is defeated. A typical game is best of three or five rounds.

—description from the publisher
family: Versions & Editions: Big Box Versions of Individual Games

description:
Get into the heart of a virtual battleground, inspired by the tension of FPS shooters and MOBA showdowns. Each match feels like a fast-paced skirmish where quick thinking and adaptability decide the winner. Will you go on the offensive to dominate the field, or play defensively to outlast your rivals?

Overmech: Battle Go Out is a shedding battle game where players compete to play higher-value cards and claim the field. But instead of just emptying your hand, you collect defeated cards as victory points, adding a layer of risk-reward strategy.

Choose between Race Mode (first to 7 points wins) or Survival Mode (last player standing), each offering a distinct blend of aggression and cunning. Fast, tactical, and unpredictable, this game turns every play into a pulse-pounding gamble!
